What is The Genius Wave?

The Genius Wave is an advanced neuroscientist-backed soundwave designed to synchronize your brain waves and activate the Theta state—the 'superbrain' frequency—through simple, daily at-home listening sessions.

How does The Genius Wave work?

According to our research, the product utilizes brain entrainment technology to gently guide your brain into the Theta wave state in just 7 minutes, effectively reconnecting brain regions that have been suppressed by modern life.
